name: infinite-monitor-desktop
description: Desktop application for Infinite Monitor – AI-powered dashboard builder

scripts.build: node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.build:mac: node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:win: node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.build:linux: node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --linux --publish never
